violators.title: ETHNOPOLITICAL PROCESSES IN THE REPUBLIC OF CRIMEA AFTER 2014
violators.abstract: The article discusses the state of ethnopolitical processes in the Republic of Crimea after 2014. The key factors and subjects of the ethnopolitical process of the Republic of Crimea are identified. It is noted that after 2014, the main factor in the ethnopolitical process of the Republic of Crimea is the Crimean Tatar factor. The article also reveals the specifics of the Crimean Tatar factor in the system of ethnopolitical processes of the Republic of Crimea.
